_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: we found that NRG-1β induced Erk 1/2 phosphorylation as early as 5 minutes post-stimulation and that the levels of phospho-Erk protein steadily increased out to 3 hours post-stimulation
details: Successfully detected NRG-1β induced Erk 1/2 phosphorylation as early as 5 minutes post-stimulation with steadily increasing levels out to 3 hours
